free_text: -NEUTRON TOTAL CROSS SECTION OF P-31 BETWEEN 0.75 MEV
ELECTRON LINEAR ACCELERATOR IN THE KELVIN
THE TARGET WAS A 2.5 CM DIAMETER SPHERE OF NATURAL
TYPICAL EVAPORATION SPECTRUM PEAKING AT ABOUT 2 MEV
P-31 IN RED POWDER FORM, THICKNESS 2.47 CM CHOSEN TO
GIVE 20 PERC. ABSORPTION.  CHEMICAL PURITY OF 97 PERC.
TIME OF FLIGHT, PATH = 19.95M, PULSE WIDTH
FOR NEUTRON BEAM MONITOR.  IT WAS CONFIRMED THAT COUNT
RATE IN THE MONITOR WAS THE SAME FOR SAMPLE IN AND OUT
STATISTICAL ERRORS IN TOTAL CROSS-SECTIONS ARE +- 5
PERC. AT 1 MEV, +- 9 PERC. AT 5 MEV AND +- 12 PERC. AT
THE IN-SCATTERING WAS LESS THAN 1 IN 10**6.
THE ENERGY RESOLUTION WAS 5 KEV AT 1 MEV AND 135 KEV
